h1.visual_description: Centered, bold, large font size, typically used for the main title of the paper.
h1.example_text: SOLAR 10.7B: Scaling Large Language Models with Upcycling

h2.visual_description: Bold, numbered (e.g., '2 '), left-aligned, larger than body text with significant leading space.

h3.visual_description: Bold, run-in heading at the start of a paragraph, followed by a period.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top-of-page figures with multi-line captions; bottom-of-column footnotes indicated by superscript numbers.
